name: Keyboard shortcuts overlay opens and closes
description: The dashboard exposes a keyboard shortcuts help overlay: a visible hint tells the user to press the question-mark key, pressing it opens a modal listing the shortcuts, and Escape closes it.

planSteps.description: Verify a small unobtrusive hint on the page tells the user they can press the question-mark key to see keyboard shortcuts
Press the question-mark key (shift and forward-slash) on the page body
Verify a modal dialog appears listing keyboard shortcuts such as arrow keys to step the replay and a key to filter failures
Verify the keyboard shortcuts modal is dismissed and no longer visible
